news.title:
Fitch affirms Tata Chemicals' Long-Term Foreign Currency IDR at BB with Stable outlook.
Rating update follows revised Corporate Rating Criteria, effective February 6, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Chemicals to establish ₹515 cr greenfield facility in Tamil Nadu.
The facility is planned at Valinokkam, Ramnathapuram district, TN.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals to establish ₹515 cr greenfield facility in Tamil Nadu.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals expects UK operations to nearly break-even by Q4 FY26, with profits next year.
Kenya's 50 KT soda ash plant aims for stabilization by March 2026, boosting EBITDA via better quality, lower emissions.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals expects UK operations to nearly break-even by Q4 FY26, with profits next year.
Kenya's 50 KT soda ash plant aims for stabilization by March 2026, boosting EBITDA via better quality, lower emissions.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals expects slow medium-term soda ash demand growth due to solar glass rise and steady sector use.
Short-term demand may lag behind global supply, impacting prices and margins; economic recovery seen as gradual.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals expects slow medium-term soda ash demand growth due to solar glass rise and steady sector use.
Short-term demand may lag behind global supply, impacting prices and margins; economic recovery seen as gradual.

news.title:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.
news.summary:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals released Q3 and 9-month FY26 results on Feb 2, 2026.
Results include unaudited consolidated and audited standalone data; audio link shared.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals released Q3 and 9-month FY26 results on Feb 2, 2026.
Results include unaudited consolidated and audited standalone data; audio link shared.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals presented Q3FY26 results showing revenue at ₹3,550 Cr, down from ₹3,877 Cr in Q2FY26 due to lower soda ash realization and seasonal factors.
Key highlights include increased sales volumes, lower fixed expenses, and strategic expansions in soda ash, bi-carb, and silica plants for future growth.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals presented Q3FY26 results showing revenue at ₹3,550 Cr, down from ₹3,877 Cr in Q2FY26 due to lower soda ash realization and seasonal factors.
Key highlights include increased sales volumes, lower fixed expenses, and strategic expansions in soda ash, bi-carb, and silica plants for future growth.

news.title: Tata Chemicals approves ₹5.15B investment for a greenfield iodised vacuum salt facility.
news.summary: Tata Chemicals approves ₹5.15B investment for a greenfield iodised vacuum salt facility.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹3.45B from ₹4.34B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 9.7% from 12.1% YoY.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹3.45B from ₹4.34B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 9.7% from 12.1% YoY.

news.title:
75 companies, including Tata Chemicals, PB Fintech, and Mahindra Lifespace, will announce Q3FY26 results on Feb. 2.
Hyundai's Q2FY26 profit rose 14.3% YoY, while Bajaj Housing Finance's profit grew 18% YoY; Indus Towers' profit fell 17.3%.
news.summary:
75 companies, including Tata Chemicals, PB Fintech, and Mahindra Lifespace, will announce Q3FY26 results on Feb. 2.
Hyundai's Q2FY26 profit rose 14.3% YoY, while Bajaj Housing Finance's profit grew 18% YoY; Indus Towers' profit fell 17.3%.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals (NSE:TATACHEM) carries a net debt of ₹55.8b with liabilities outweighing cash and receivables by ₹123b.
Its debt-to-EBITDA ratio is 3.0, with weak interest cover of 2.3, raising concerns about balance sheet health.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals (NSE:TATACHEM) carries a net debt of ₹55.8b with liabilities outweighing cash and receivables by ₹123b.
Its debt-to-EBITDA ratio is 3.0, with weak interest cover of 2.3, raising concerns about balance sheet health.

news.title:
Tata Steel infused ₹1,354.9 cr into T Steel Holdings; RITES signed an MoU with Botswana for railway modernization.
Tata Chemicals to acquire Novabay Pte; Granules India completed US FDA inspection with 5 observations; Adani explores nuclear power.
news.summary:
Tata Steel infused ₹1,354.9 cr into T Steel Holdings; RITES signed an MoU with Botswana for railway modernization.
Tata Chemicals to acquire Novabay Pte; Granules India completed US FDA inspection with 5 observations; Adani explores nuclear power.

news.title: Tata Chemicals to acquire all shares of Novabay for €25M enterprise value.
news.summary: Tata Chemicals to acquire all shares of Novabay for €25M enterprise value.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals' subsidiary TCIPL to acquire 100% stake in Novabay for EUR 25M.
Acquisition aligns with TCL's focus on premium sodium bicarbonate, boosting specialty market presence.
news.summary:
Tata Chemicals' subsidiary TCIPL to acquire 100% stake in Novabay for EUR 25M.

news.title:
Tata Chemicals approves ₹1,500 cr NCD issuance on private placement.
NCDs are unsecured, rated, redeemable, taxable with 7.1% coupon for 2 years.

news.title:
Tata Power signed agreements for Bhutan's ₹13,100 crore hydropower project; Tata Chemicals announced ₹910 crore capacity expansions.
Natco Pharma faced FDA observations; RVNL, HG Infra won railway/metro bids; Lemon Tree expanded in Bhopal; Sandur secured MPAP allocation.
news.summary:
Tata Power signed agreements for Bhutan's ₹13,100 crore hydropower project; Tata Chemicals announced ₹910 crore capacity expansions.
Natco Pharma faced FDA observations; RVNL, HG Infra won railway/metro bids; Lemon Tree expanded in Bhopal; Sandur secured MPAP allocation.
